items.definition_en: A clock shows the time.
items.example_en: The clock on the wall shows 3 o'clock.

items.definition_en: A watch is worn to tell the time.
items.example_en: He looked at his watch to check the time.

items.definition_en: An alarm clock wakes you up at a set time.
items.example_en: My alarm clock rings at seven every morning.

items.definition_en: A timer counts down to zero.
items.example_en: Set the timer for ten minutes.

items.definition_en: A stopwatch measures how long something takes.
items.example_en: The coach used a stopwatch during the race.

items.definition_en: A wall clock hangs on the wall and shows time.
items.example_en: She checked the wall clock in her office.

items.definition_en: A sand timer measures time with moving sand.
items.example_en: They used a sand timer for the game.

items.definition_en: A wristwatch is worn on your wrist to tell time.
items.example_en: She wears a wristwatch every day.

items.definition_en: A grandfather clock is a tall, old clock.
items.example_en: The grandfather clock chimed at midday.

items.definition_en: A digital watch shows time with numbers.
items.example_en: His digital watch has a bright display.

items.definition_en: A pocket watch is a small clock carried in a pocket.
items.example_en: He keeps a pocket watch from his grandfather.

items.definition_en: A table clock stands on a desk or table.
items.example_en: She placed a table clock next to her books.

items.definition_en: A cuckoo clock sounds when the hour changes.
items.example_en: The cuckoo clock made a loud sound at noon.

items.definition_en: A kitchen timer is used to measure cooking times.
items.example_en: Please set the kitchen timer for the cake.

items.definition_en: An hourglass shows time with falling sand.
items.example_en: The hourglass ran out during the test.

items.definition_en: A tower clock is a large clock on a tower.
items.example_en: The city tower clock can be seen from far away.

items.definition_en: A wall timer is used to count time on the wall.
items.example_en: Turn the wall timer to set the lights.

items.definition_en: A sundial uses the sun to show the time.
items.example_en: The sundial in the garden is very old.

items.definition_en: An alarm makes a sound at a certain time.
items.example_en: He set an alarm for his meeting.

items.definition_en: An egg timer helps to boil eggs for the right time.
items.example_en: Use the egg timer to check when the eggs are ready.
